title: jor's Cobblemon Music Pack (Reactive Music)
description: For all your catching needs! Enjoy multiple tracks from across the Pokemon Games that reflect the biomes you explore!
body:
# **[REACTIVE MUSIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions) REQUIRED** and its dependency [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

A songpack for the Reactive Music Mod that replaces Minecraft Music with 49 tracks from the Pokemon games that change dynamically depending on your biome, time of day, dimension, as well as adding boss music.

Although designed with Cobblemon in mind, it is not required and works just fine without it.  

Compatible with **Terralith, Tectonic, Biomes O' Plenty, and Oh The Biomes We've Gone**.

Due to requiring the Reactive Music mod, this pack is **fabric only**, and only available for versions **1.21.1, 1.21.4**

Also supports **1.20.1** but will have some issues

Tracklist available in the change log

> 
<details>
<summary>HOW TO INSTALL</summary>

## Installation Guide

1. Download the most recent version of [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions) along side [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
2. Add this songpack to your resource packs folder **(no need to enable it)**
3. Open Reactive Music's settings through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or through the /reactivemusic command in the world
4. Select jor'sCobblemonMusicPack
5. Enjoy!

</details>
